PLAINTIFFS REQUEST A JURY TRIAL AND CHECKED THE RECORD THAT JURY FEES WERE NOT POSTED. PLAINTIFFS SEEK THAT THE COURT EXERCISES DISCRETION IN THIS MATTER TO PROCEED WITH JURY TRIAL. COURT INQUIRES PLAINTIFFS WHY FEES WERE NOT POSTED. PLAINTIFFS RESPOND THAT THERE IS NO SPECIFIC REASON WHY FEES WERE NOT POSTED. PLAINTIFFS PREPARED FOR A JURY TRIAL, JURY INSTRUCTIONS AND MOTIONS IN LIMINE. DEFENDANTS REQUEST A COURT TRIAL. PLAINTIFFS REQUEST THAT THE COURT EXERCISES DISCRETION PURSUANT TO 631(G)CCP. THE COURT STATES THAT IT WILL PROCEED AS A COURT TRIAL. CASE IS PLACED ON TELEPHONE STANDBY. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
